statement: In every magma, Equation 1205 (`x = y * ((z * (w * y)) * w)`) implies Equation 450 (`x = x * (y * (z * (y * x)))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0645
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z (op w y)) w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op x (op y (op z (op y x))))
